case_title: PARKER, DAVID vs. WILLIS, DAVE et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIS, DAVE WEISNER, JAMES
